channel.title: VaultMind Fixture Feed
channel.description: Deterministic RSS fixture for tests/sources/ and manual CLI verification.

item.title: First fixture post
item.description: The oldest fixture post — used to confirm cursor advancement skips it on rerun.

item.title: Second fixture post
item.description: A middle fixture post about incremental indexing and durable cursors.

item.title: Third fixture post
item.description: The newest fixture post — should always be ingested on a first run.
